summary: Demand for US natural gas is set to rise in the next 10 years more than it did for the past 15 years amid growing power needs from data centers supporting artificial intelligence and a global push for energy security, according to the head of Williams Cos.

title_cn: 交易员权衡特朗普最新的伊朗威胁，油价保持下跌
summary: Oil held a modest decline, as traders shrugged off President Donald Trump’s newest threat to resume strikes on Iran, a pledge the US leader has made repeatedly before backing off since a truce was agreed to in early April.

title: Heat Strains US Power Grids That Need Off-Season Repairs
title_cn: 热压美国电网需要淡季维修
summary: A blast of late-spring heat is straining electric grids in the eastern US as power-plant owners race to repair equipment ahead of rising demand and hotter-than-normal weather expected this summer.

title: Building Fan Community Key to WNBA Success, Says Valkyries President Jess Smith
title_cn: Valkyries 总裁 Jess Smith 表示，建立球迷社区是 WNBA 成功的关键
summary: Jess Smith, president of the Golden State Valkyries, said that building community and connection in a deeper way and then building a business around that foundation has been key to her teams success in their first season. Smith said that the Valkyries, a team that was recently rated at a $1 billion valuation, are serious about upholding 'golden state culture' and investing in the fan experience to attract a dedicated fanbase and grow the franchise as the WNBA enters its 30th season.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: New HSBC Report Reveals Gap in Addressing Women's Financial Goals
title_cn: 汇丰银行新报告揭示了在实现女性财务目标方面的差距
summary:
Racquel Oden, HSBC head of international wealth and private banking, said that while women have financial literacy, many feel that they don't have the fluency to make the right decisions about their finances by themselves. 
Oden, who joined the show alongside Bloomberg senior editor Claire Obusan, broke down a new report from HSBC that revealed women feel that traditional financial advice doesn't address the complexity of their financial goals.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Japan Spent Billions and Yen Is Still Falling
title_cn: 日本花费数十亿美元，日元仍在贬值
summary: For the full experience visit: Japan Spent Billions and Yen Is Still Falling

title: Itochu Takes Over AirLife’s Japan Sales in Healthcare Expansion
title_cn: 伊藤忠商事接管 AirLife 在日本的医疗保健业务扩张业务
summary: A subsidiary of Japanese trading house Itochu Corp. will take over SunMed Group Holdings’ Japan sales operations, as the US medical equipment maker struggles to remain profitable in the country due to the weak yen and inflationary pressure.

title: Massive Options Bet Rattles Oil Market On Edge Over Iran War
title_cn: 大量期权押注令石油市场因伊朗战争而紧张不安
summary: A huge options bet Tuesday on Brent crude prices plunging rattled oil traders already on high alert for unusual flows, as Iran war headlines continue to whipsaw prices and regulators probe suspicious trading.

title: Big Treasury Block Sales Drive ‘Capitulation’ Selloff in Bonds
title_cn: 美国国债大宗销售推动债券“投降”抛售
summary: A series of large sales in US Treasury futures exacerbated a selloff in the $31 trillion government debt market, as concern about resurgent inflation pushed investors to price in higher interest rates.

title: Stocks Fall for Third Day as Semiconductor Shares Erase Rebound
title_cn: 由于半导体股消除反弹，股市连续第三天下跌
summary: US stocks retreated for a third day, weighed down by rising bond yields and the threat of entrenched inflation. Semiconductor shares erased an afternoon rebound, with Nvidia Corp. declining ahead of results due Wednesday.

title: Saks Global CEO on Next Steps in Bankruptcy Process, Path To Growth
title_cn: Saks 全球首席执行官谈破产程序的后续步骤和增长之路
summary: Saks Global CEO Geoffroy van Raemdonck discusses the progress the company has made since filing for bankruptcy. He discusses what the luxury retail space looks like for the brands that do business with Saks and what role brick and mortar stores will play going forward. He speaks with Romaine Bostick on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Aspen Group Eyes New Investors to Address Debt as Earnings Slump
title_cn: 阿斯彭集团寻找新投资者来解决盈利下滑带来的债务问题
summary: The Aspen Group, the owner of one of the largest dental care chains in the US, is exploring tapping outside investors to tackle the maturities of roughly $3 billion of loans due next year amid weaker earnings, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Stocks Fall as Fed-Hike Anxiety Lifts Bond Yields: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 由于美联储加息的焦虑提升债券收益率，股市下跌：市场总结
summary: The latest bout of weakness in bonds lifted yields to multi-year highs, reducing the appetite for stocks on speculation that a torrid market surge has gone too far amid war-fueled inflation risks.

title: US 30-Year Yield Hits Highest Since 2007 as Selloff Deepens
title_cn: 随着抛售加剧，美国 30 年期国债收益率创 2007 年以来最高
summary: Yields on the US Treasury’s longest-dated bond rose to the highest level in almost two decades as investor concerns mount that accelerating inflation will force central bankers to raise interest rates.

title: Gold Declines as Inflation Fears Fuel Interest Rate Hike Bets
title_cn: 通胀担忧加剧加息押注，金价下跌
summary: Gold declined as persistent concerns over inflation fueled bets that global central banks may be forced to hike interest rates. Silver slumped to the lowest in nearly two weeks.

title: Consumers Look For Bling for Buck In Lab Grown Gemstones
title_cn: 消费者在实验室培育的宝石中寻找闪亮的宝石
summary: Nathalie Morrison, Astrea London Founder joins Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss the growing trend on lab grown diamonds, the intersection of sustainability, innovation, and the future of the diamond industry. (Source: Bloomberg)

title_cn: 随着主要生产国印度尼西亚供应风险的增加，镍价上涨
summary: Nickel prices climbed following a report of further output cuts in Indonesia, and as the top producer of the metal took steps to control its commodities exports.

title_cn: 印尼在抛售中为其最新美元和欧元债券定价
summary: Indonesia sold $3.45 billion of bonds in dollars and euros Tuesday, as the Iran conflict stokes concerns about the nation’s economic vulnerability.

title_cn: Ecolab 筹集 50 亿美元资金支持公司收购 CoolIT
summary: Ecolab Inc. priced $5 billion of investment-grade bonds to help finance its pending takeover of CoolIT Systems Inc.

title: UK Explores Visa For Wealthy Who Invest £5 Million
title_cn: 英国探索为投资 500 万英镑的富人发放签证
summary: The UK is weighing a new visa that would give three years of residency to wealthy individuals investing at least £5 million ($6.7 million) in the country, as the nation seeks to revive its global attractiveness. Ben Stupples explains  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Now Even AI Is Seeing Growing AI Concentration Risk
title_cn: 现在，就连人工智能也面临着日益增长的人工智能集中度风险
summary: It’s not just stocks.

title: Surging Bond Yields Add to Pressures Building for Fed’s Warsh
title_cn: 债券收益率飙升加剧美联储施压的压力
summary: Kevin Warsh is poised to take the helm of the US central bank later this week facing pressure from the White House to deliver interest-rate cuts and growing resolve from his colleagues to stand pat. Now the bond market is piling on.

title_cn: 投资者因利率不确定性而对风险最高的股票感到焦虑
summary: Investors are starting to hedge the risk of a drop in the Russell 2000 Index of smaller companies, despite investors remaining bullish on large-cap stocks.

title: Japan’s Finance Chief Pledges Bold Action for Weak Yen as Needed
title_cn: 日本财务长承诺根据需要采取大胆行动应对日元疲软
summary: Japan’s Finance Minister Satsuki Katayama indicated her resolve to intervene in a foreign exchange market to prop up the yen as needed as her Group of Seven counterparts understand the nation’s stance.

title: Slow Data Center Hookups Offer US Power Grids Summer Relief
title_cn: 缓慢的数据中心连接为美国电网提供了夏季缓解
summary: Key grids across the US have lowered their summer demand forecasts to reflect the slower-than-anticipated pace of data centers and other large connections, potentially helping avoid heat-related blackouts and energy shortages in the coming months.

title: Oil & Gas Dealmaking Heats Up With $20 Billion of Assets in Play
title_cn: 石油与天然气天然气交易升温，资产规模达 200 亿美元
summary: Buyout shops are finding a rare exit opportunity in the US oil patch.

title: SpaceX Going Public Is Igniting Wall Street’s Own Race to Orbit
title_cn: SpaceX 上市引发了华尔街的轨道竞赛
summary: As Elon Musk readies SpaceX for a highly anticipated initial public offering, Wall Street is racing to find the next big winner in space exploration.

title: JPMorgan’s CIO Sees Leadership Test as AI Fuels Shift
title_cn: 摩根大通首席信息官将领导力测试视为人工智能推动转变
summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. faces a daunting management challenge from artificial intelligence as the bank reaps productivity benefits while racing to contain a new set of risks, Global Chief Information Officer Lori Beer said.

title: SpaceX Is Said to Plan to Buy Startup Cursor 30 Days After IPO
title_cn: 据称 SpaceX 计划在 IPO 30 天后收购 Startup Cursor
summary: SpaceX expects to proceed with its acquisition of artificial intelligence coding startup Cursor 30 days after Elon Musk’s company begins trading publicly, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: What Byron Allen Has Planned for Buzzfeed, Late-Night Show
title_cn: 拜伦·艾伦 (Byron Allen) 为 Buzzfeed 深夜秀计划了什么
summary: Byron Allen, founder, chair and CEO of Allen Media Group, discusses his plans to turn Buzzfeed into a free-TV super app. Speaking with Romaine Bostick on "Bloomberg The Close," Allen also comments on taking over Stephen Colbert's "Late Show" time slot. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Analog Devices to Acquire Empower in $1.5 Billion Transaction
title_cn: Analog Devices 将斥资 15 亿美元收购 Empower
summary: Analog Devices Inc. agreed to acquire closely held Empower Semiconductor for $1.5 billion in cash as the need skyrockets for efficient chips to power data centers required for artificial intelligence.

title: Ross Gerber Says AI Efficiency Gains Already 'Amazing'
title_cn: 罗斯·格伯 (Ross Gerber) 表示人工智能效率的提高已经“惊人”
summary: Gerber Kawasaki Wealth and Investment Management co-founder and CEO Ross Gerber previews Nvidia's first-quarter earnings report and what it might signal for the AI industry on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: College Kids Don't Want Your AI
title_cn: 大学生不想要你的人工智能
summary: Students are pushing back against the adoption of AI on campuses, with some organizing protests, petitions, and performance art to express their concerns about the technology's effects on their education and job prospects. Bloomberg’s Victor Swezey has more.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hasbro Cancels Dungeons & Dragons Game From ‘Star Wars’ Veteran
title_cn: 孩之宝取消《地下城与地下城》 《星球大战》老手的《龙》游戏
summary: Independent studio Giant Skull had announced a deal with Hasbro’s Wizards of the Coast last year.

title: College Kids Don’t Want Your AI
title_cn: 大学生不想要你的人工智能
summary: The unique threat artificial intelligence poses to students’ education and their hopes of someday landing a job has made the university a powerful crucible for anti-AI resistance.

title: JP Morgan’s Global CIO Lori Beer on the Pace of Change in the Tech Space
title_cn: 摩根大通全球首席信息官 Lori Beer 谈科技领域的变革步伐
summary: JP Morgan Global CIO Lori Beer discusses the acceleration of change in the tech space, even in the last year. She discusses the anxiety that can come from the ever-changing landscape, but recognizes that there is a huge demand for it as well. She speaks with Bloomberg Surveillance Host Lisa Abramowicz at the JP Morgan Tech, Media & Communications Conference.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Chainalysis CEO Tracks Prediction Market Insider Trading
title_cn: Chainaanalysis 首席执行官跟踪预测市场内幕交易
summary: Jonathan Levin, founder and CEO of Chainalysis, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Polymarket is partnering with blockchain analytics firm Chainalysis to help police its platform as prediction markets grapple with increased scrutiny over insider trading.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How Traders Evaluate the Divergence Between US and Chinese AI Models
title_cn: 交易者如何评估美国和中国人工智能模型之间的差异
summary: On this episode of the Odd Lots podcast, Deutsche Bank's Ozan Tarman and Aditya Singhal join Tracy Alloway and Joe Weisenthal to break down the different areas where the East and West are deploying capital and developing AI technology. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stablecoins Allow Global Expansion: Native Markets CEO
title_cn: Native Markets 首席执行官：稳定币可以实现全球扩张
summary: Mary-Catherine Lader, co-founder and CEO of Native Markets, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." They discuss Hyperliquid, stablecoin growth, and US legislation.   (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Wall Street Watchdogs Pause Some Cyber Exams After Mythos Shock
title_cn: 神话冲击后，华尔街监管机构暂停了一些网络考试
summary: US regulators are pausing some cyber-related examinations of the largest banks, giving the lenders more breathing room as the firms dig into the risks exposed by Anthropic PBC’s new Mythos AI model.

title: JP Morgan’s US Leveraged Finance Managing Director on the Landscape of Tech Investing
title_cn: 摩根大通美国杠杆融资董事总经理谈科技投资格局
summary: JP Morgan’s US Leveraged Finance Managing Director David De Boltz discusses the scope of the financing needed in the next fives years in the technology space. He discusses how investors are all trying to get into the space in whatever way they can, and where those investors are putting their money. He speaks with Bloomberg Surveillance Host Lisa Abramowicz at the JP Morgan Tech, Media & Communications Conference.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Crypto Crime Escalates With Kidnappings, Cons and Human Coercion
title_cn: 加密货币犯罪随着绑架、诈骗和人为胁迫而升级
summary: Bloomberg's Isabelle Lee joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." After a year of kidnappings, assaults and armed home invasions targeting cryptocurrency holders, the industry is racing to harden its defenses. Conferences are beefing up security. Private firms serving crypto holders say demand has surged. Exchanges are protecting their executives. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Parts of Clarity Act 'Too Vague': ABA's Ybarra
title_cn: 澄清法案的部分内容“过于模糊”：ABA 的 Ybarra
summary: Brooke Ybarra, SVP of innovation and strategy at American Bankers Association (ABA), joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Last week the Senate Banking Committee advanced landmark crypto legislation despite a late push from banking groups. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Data Center Borrowing Rapidly Climbs Wall Street’s Risk List
title_cn: 人工智能数据中心借款迅速攀升华尔街风险名单
summary: Borrowing tied to the AI data-center boom is quickly climbing Wall Street’s list of potential credit threats, as investors increasingly worry that the breakneck pace of financing could sow the seeds of the next market shock.

title: Dollar 'Extremely More Powerful' with US Bill: Thorn
title_cn: 索恩：美元与美元“更加强大”
summary: Alex Thorn, head of firmwide research at Galaxy Digital, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Last week the Senate Banking Committee advanced landmark crypto legislation.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kraken's Parent See Earnings Tumble; Cuts Jobs
title_cn: Kraken 母公司盈利大幅下滑；裁员
summary: Bloomberg's Olga Kharif joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Kraken has cut some staff to reduce costs and reportedly may not go public as soon as initially expected. Payward, which operates crypto exchange Kraken, reported a steep decline in first-quarter adjusted earnings. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Clarity Act Wins Senate Committee Vote, Crypto Wrench Attacks Surge | Bloomberg Crypto 5/19/2026
title_cn: 《澄清法案》赢得参议院委员会投票，加密扳手攻击激增 |彭博加密货币 2026 年 5 月 19 日
summary: "Bloomberg Crypto" covers the people, transactions, and technology shaping the world of decentralized finance. Today's guests: Galaxy Digital Head of Firmwide Research Alex Thorn, American Bankers Association SVP of Innovation and Strategy Brooke Ybarra, Native Markets Co-Founder & CEO Mary-Catherine Lader, and Chainalsis Co-Founder & CEO Jonathan Levin. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Google Revamps Search for AI Era, Debuts Coding Tools
title_cn: 谷歌改进人工智能时代搜索，推出编码工具
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google is redesigning its iconic search box and adding new artificial intelligence coding tools, the latest steps in the company’s multibillion-dollar campaign to expand influence in the age of AI.

title: Bloomberg House Miami 2026 Highlights
title_cn: Bloomberg House 迈阿密 2026 年亮点
summary: Set against one of the world’s most electrifying sporting stages, Bloomberg House Miami brought together global leaders for dynamic conversations on finance, entertainment, technology and sports ahead of the Formula 1 Miami Grand Prix. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Musk Turns to Loyalists to Rebuild xAI Ahead of SpaceX IPO
title_cn: 在 SpaceX 首次公开募股之前，马斯克转向忠诚者重建 xAI
summary: Who's leading Musk's AI company? He's turned to leaders at his other companies to rebuild the startup.

title: Google Hires Staff From Bezos-Backed Contextual AI In Licensing Deal
title_cn: 谷歌通过许可协议从贝佐斯支持的情境人工智能中聘用员工
summary: Google DeepMind has reached a deal to hire more than 20 researchers from artificial intelligence startup Contextual AI and license its technology, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Google, Blackstone to Create AI Cloud Firm
title_cn: 谷歌和黑石将创建人工智能云公司
summary: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow discuss Google's decision to create an AI cloud business with Blackstone which will run on Google's homegrown AI chips. Plus, the legal battle between Elon Musk and his OpenAI co-founders ends with a jury ruling that Musk waited too long to sue. And, Meta bets big on Louisiana for the world's biggest AI facility, as it plans AI-related layoffs this week. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stulberg Says Energy Problems Will Persist After Strait Reopens
title_cn: 斯图尔伯格表示，海峡重新开放后能源问题将持续存在
summary: Adam Stulberg, Chair and Professor at Georgia Tech’s Sam Nunn School of International Affairs, says energy markets are unlikely to return to their pre-conflict normal, as displaced tankers, depleted supply stocks, damaged infrastructure and weakened market shock absorbers keep pressure on prices. He discusses the prospect of NATO joining efforts to stabilize shipping through the Strait, Europe’s energy vulnerabilities and how elevated oil prices could affect Georgia voters, consumers and businesses heading into November. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg’s “Balance of Power” live from Atlanta, Georgia. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Affordability Is Top Issue for Voters: Atlanta Mayor
title_cn: 负担能力是选民的首要问题：亚特兰大市长
summary: Andre Dickens, Mayor of Atlanta, says turnout has been “pretty good” on primary day in Georgia and that affordability is top of mind for voters, citing the cost of rent, gas, food and health care. Dickens discusses his Neighborhood Reinvestment Initiative, including investments in affordable housing, early childhood learning and food access. He also discusses how Atlanta is using artificial intelligence, and how the city is preparing to host FIFA World Cup matches in 2026. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg’s “Balance of Power” live from Atlanta, Georgia. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump-Massie Showdown Comes to a Head in Kentucky Primary
title_cn: 肯塔基州初选特朗普与马西的对决进入白热化阶段
summary: It’s decision day for Representative Thomas Massie.

title: Trump Tells Agencies to Advise Banks on Immigrant Services
title_cn: 特朗普要求各机构就移民服务向银行提供建议
summary: President Donald Trump signed an executive order Tuesday that directs regulators to issue guidance on banking services to undocumented migrants, in a move that could tighten access to the financial system amid the administration’s immigration crackdown.

title: DOJ Unveils Price-Fixing Charges in Shipping Container Case
title_cn: 美国司法部公布海运集装箱案件中的价格垄断指控
summary: The US Justice Department said Tuesday that it had filed criminal charges against four of the world’s largest makers of shipping containers and their top executives for allegedly colluding to raise prices during the pandemic.

title: Trump Taps Paxton Over Incumbent Cornyn in Texas Senate Race
title_cn: 特朗普在德克萨斯州参议员竞选中选择帕克斯顿而非现任科宁
summary: President Donald Trump endorsed Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton in the state’s Republican Senate primary shortly after early voting began in an increasingly personal and expensive runoff against incumbent Senator John Cornyn.

title: Yields Rise on Inflation Angst | Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 5/19/2026
title_cn: 通胀担忧导致收益率上升彭博商业周刊日报 5/19/2026
summary: Alli McCartney, UBS Alignment Partners private wealth advisor and managing director of wealth management and Bloomberg rates reporter Michael Mackenzie, discuss the bond market landscape as yields push higher on fears around accelerating inflation. Then, Brett Mufson, president of Fontainebleau Development breaks down the consumer landscape on Las Vegas tourism and the state of the consumer. Plus, Nathalie Morrison, founder of lab grown diamond company Astrea London on the rise of lab grown gemstones and its impact on the diamond market. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Senate Signals Intensifying Opposition to Trump’s War in Iran
title_cn: 美国参议院发出信号，强烈反对特朗普的伊朗战争
summary: The Republican-led US Senate signaled mounting opposition to continuing the Iran war in a procedural vote Tuesday, reflecting deepening political unease over a foreign conflict that is taking a financial toll on Americans.

title: Trump Threatens Iran With ‘Big Hit’ If There’s No Deal Soon
title_cn: 特朗普威胁称，如果短期内无法达成协议，将“重创”伊朗
summary: President Donald Trump threatened to resume strikes on Iran in the coming days as part of the push for a deal to end the war, after he said he had just called off a US attack.

title: RFK Jr. Taps Haridopolos as Temporary Surgeon General
title_cn: 小罗伯特·肯尼迪任命哈里多波洛斯为临时卫生局局长
summary: Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. enlisted health official Stephanie Haridopolos to temporarily take on some of the responsibilities of the US surgeon general, he said in an email to staff viewed by Bloomberg News.

title: KKR Consortium Warns White House of ‘Bias’ in $10 Billion Argentina Auction
title_cn: KKR 财团警告白宫在 100 亿美元的阿根廷拍卖中存在“偏见”
summary: A consortium of dredging companies backed by KKR & Co. complained to the White House of unfair conditions in bidding for a pivotal contract in Argentina, calling on the US for “timely engagement.”

title: SoftBank’s $60 Billion OpenAI Bet Sparks Concerns
title_cn: 软银 600 亿美元押注 OpenAI 引发担忧
summary: SoftBank’s Masayoshi Son has bet $60 billion on Sam Altman and OpenAI. Find out what’s driving his conviction — and why some see a risky, one‑sided dynamic emerging — on the Big Take Asia Podcast. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Regulators Propose Reshaping Secret Bank Ratings Process
title_cn: 美国监管机构提议重塑秘密银行评级流程
summary: US regulators unveiled a proposal to overhaul how examiners secretly rate banks, a move likely to be cheered by lenders who have long griped about the process.

title: Trump’s IRS Settlement Includes Dropping Tax Cases, Audits
title_cn: 特朗普与国税局的和解包括放弃税务案件和审计
summary: President Donald Trump scored a major legal victory over the Internal Revenue Service on Tuesday as the agency he has long reviled was barred by the Justice Department from continuing any “known and unknown” probes into his tax returns.

title: Trump, With Texas Endorsement, Shows He Can Still Surprise Republicans
title_cn: 特朗普在得克萨斯州的支持下，表明他仍然可以让共和党人感到惊讶
summary: President throws his weight behind Paxton late in the GOP runoff.

title: Primary Day in Georgia | Balance of Power: Early Edition 5/19/2026
title_cn: 乔治亚州小学日|权力平衡：早期版本 2026 年 5 月 19 日
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss Tuesday's primary elections. On today's show, Joe and Kailey are live from Georgia Tech in Atlanta. They speak with Atlanta Metor Chamber CEO Katie Kirkpatrick, Carter Center CEO Paige Alexander and Georgia Restaurant Association President and CEO Stephanie Fischer. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: New York’s Lawler Casts Doubt on More SALT Tax Relief This Year
title_cn: 纽约的劳勒对今年更多的盐税减免表示怀疑
summary: Representative Mike Lawler, a key negotiator behind the temporary increase to the cap on state and local tax deductions, pushed back on efforts to further expand the tax break through legislation later this year.

title: Reeves Floats Price Freezes on Food in Bid to Cut UK Bills
title_cn: 里夫斯浮动食品价格冻结以削减英国账单
summary: Chancellor of the Exchequer Rachel Reeves has privately proposed voluntary price freezes on food in supermarkets, as the UK government seeks to ease cost of living pressures for struggling Britons.

title: Vance Says Poland Troop Decision Will Push Europe to Step Up
title_cn: 万斯表示波兰驻军决定将推动欧洲加强行动
summary: Vice President JD Vance said a decision to scrap the deployment of 4,000 troops to Poland was a standard delay that would encourage European nations to do more to provide for their own security.

title: Affordability in Focus As Georgia Heads To The Polls
title_cn: 佐治亚州即将举行投票，负担能力成为焦点
summary: Metro Atlanta Chamber CEO Katie Kirkpatrick said Georgia has invested heavily in the power grid and water supply that will help the state cope with the expansion of data centers needed to drive artificial intelligence development. She also discussed the Georgia economy as voting continues.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump’s Greenland Envoy to Brief President on Visit This Week
title_cn: 特朗普的格陵兰特使本周将向总统通报访问情况
summary: Donald Trump’s special envoy to Greenland said he’s on the island on an information-gathering trip and plans to brief the US president later this week on potential business opportunities in the territory.

title: Trump Taps Paxton Over Incumbent Cornyn in Texas Senate Race
title_cn: 特朗普在德克萨斯州参议员竞选中选择帕克斯顿而非现任科宁
summary: President Donald Trump endorsed Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton in the state's Republican Senate primary. Trump's endorsement is seen as critical in Texas, and gives Paxton a crucial boost after doubts about his candidacy following years of political scandal. Tyler Kendall reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Refrains From Trading His Own Stocks, Vance Says
title_cn: 万斯表示，特朗普不会交易自己的股票
summary: Vice President JD Vance defended Donald Trump from criticism over his voluminous trading of financial assets, saying the president does not buy or sell his own stocks.

title: We're 'Lacking' Global Health Security Says Alexander
title_cn: 亚历山大说我们“缺乏”全球卫生安全
summary: Paige Alexander, Carter Center CEO joined Balance of Power to discuss the Georgia primaries as voters head to the polls. She also discussed the recent Ebola emergency declaration from the WHO and why its so important to have global health security. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Is Trying To Be a Kingmaker In Texas Says Lawson
title_cn: 劳森称特朗普正试图成为德克萨斯州的拥护者
summary:
Stephen Lawson, Principal in Dentons' Regulatory, Public Policy and Government Affairs Practice & Republican Strategist joined Balance of Power to discuss the primaries happening across the country today as well as  President Donald Trump endorsed Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton in the state’s Republican Senate primary race. 

 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Canada’s Wealth Fund Is Not Aimed at Lowering Investors’ Taxes, Champagne Says
title_cn: 香槟表示，加拿大财富基金的目的不是降低投资者的税收
summary: Canada’s finance minister said the country’s planned sovereign wealth fund will be designed to allow citizens to contribute to major nation-building projects, but isn’t intended to reduce their tax burdens.

title: Appeals Court Skeptical Anthropic Can Block US Supply-Risk Label
title_cn: 上诉法院对 Anthropic 能否阻止美国供应风险标签持怀疑态度
summary: A federal appeals court appeared skeptical of Anthropic’s bid to block the Pentagon from declaring that the company poses a supply-chain risk to US national security, a move that led to a ban on government use of its artificial intelligence technology.

title: Trump Threatens Iran With ‘Big Hit’ If There’s No Deal Soon
title_cn: 特朗普威胁称，如果短期内无法达成协议，将“重创”伊朗
summary: President Donald Trump threatened to resume strikes on Iran in the coming days as part of the push for a deal to end the war, after he said he had just called off a US attack Breck Heidlberg, Managing Director at FTI Consulting joined Balance of Power to discuss the developments out of the Middle East as well as how it is effecting the midterm election races.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Defense Chief Warns UK Credibility at Risk in Leadership Dispute
title_cn: 国防部长警告英国在领导权之争中的信誉面临风险
summary: Defense Secretary John Healey said that Britain’s credibility was at stake in the Labour’s Party’s leadership crisis, urging those in government to put the security of the country before politics.
